dc_description: A narrow paved road curves through a wooded area with dense green foliage on both sides. Sunlight filters through the trees, creating patchy shadows across the road surface. On the right, a metal pole holds an orange directional sign reading “via Francigena sentiero alternativo,” with an arrow pointing left and a small pilgrim icon. On the left side, smaller signs are mounted near dry grass and brush along the roadside.
novel_visual_observations: The road surface appears pale and slightly cracked, with dry leaves and debris along the edges. The weather appears sunny and dry; no bicycle is visible in the image.
rich_context: Via Formellese, Municipio Roma XV, Olgiata, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, Italia
